About Us

Who We Are

KF LEGACY RESOURCES was established in November 2015. We provide network service management to help clients focus on their core business while we deliver reliable, scalable support.

At KF Legacy Resources, we strive to deliver the best service experience so clients meet high expectations and feel confident in the outcomes.

We provide network infrastructure, management, security and technical support — from standalone networks to WAN — connecting branches securely with cost‑efficient, high‑speed networking.

Through consultation, we deliver effective solutions aligned to each client’s objectives. Every customer is unique; we build long‑term trust by tailoring approaches to their potential, vision and goals.

KF Legacy Resources with Registration Number: 201503318537 (002488335-X) valid until 14 November 2029

At a Glance

  • Established 2015
  • Network infrastructure & management
  • Security & technical support
  • WAN & inter-branch connectivity
  • Client-first, long-term partnership
Security First

Hardened designs, monitoring and assessments to protect your network and data.

Scalable Infrastructure

From standalone networks to WAN, architectures that grow with your business.

Trusted Delivery

Outcomes, timelines and communication you can trust.

Years Experience
50+

Our Vision

Vision KF Legacy Resources is to be the premier provider of Bumiputera ICT, Security & Surveillance & Renewable Energy (designing, supplying, consulting, retain) for attainment of our business objectives in the interests of society and the nation at large. Preferred option for the delivery of public sector ICT solutions, innovative and integrative services.

We also provide a facilitator to our client’s business infrastructure. We will continue to map our experience and skills with the demands of business customers. We became more of a commodity, plays a significant role in life and business. Companies need to master ICT, ICT to streamline the business to make their business grow.

ICT is everywhere now and the company has opened a border. Your customers participate effectively in your business processes; they look at the quality, ICT services and will judge them, so you have to make them state of the art. You need to make ICT work for your business. And you have to realize that ICT changes the rules of the game: small, dedicated companies can be effective specific players in the world market.

Aligning business and ICT should be part of your strategy. ICT is also growing rapidly and therefore motivates change. Making change happen in a planned way requires the art of project management. Making changes people need change management. And you need to do continuous improvement. Finally, the company has a social responsibility. The concept of sustainable production is here to stay, and ICT becomes a more important part in the delivery of services.

Premier Provider

Bumiputera leadership in ICT, Security & Renewable Energy.

Business Facilitator

Mapping know‑how to market demands to accelerate growth.

Strategy & Change

Planned transformation, change management and continuous improvement.

Our Mission

KF Legacy Resources mission is to provide the best customer service at reasonable cost but with high quality and on time delivery in whatever business dealing it provides to its esteem customers.

KF Legacy Resources mission is to keep offering and supporting our customers with reliable technologies and solutions to help them stay at the competitive edge of their businesses.

KF Legacy Resources wants to help companies in making the transition to sustainable activities, process oriented business and service oriented IT. We will help in making ICT more transparent, better performing and closer aligned to the goals of your company and the expectations of your customers. We believe in continuous improvement, in the need to make change happen in a structured and human way, and we will help our customers in establishing the necessary change. We go to market with a vision and a strategy and believ we are addressing the essential areas of innovation. We continually maintain and build a solid know how of ICT best practices and frameworks. We base our missions on the values of openness, innovation and knowledge sharing.

On‑time Delivery
Reliable Technologies
Competitive Edge
Continuous Improvement

Our Value

Integrity

We act ethically and transparently, building trust with clients and stakeholders.

Partnership

We collaborate with public and private stakeholders so outcomes meet real needs.

Excellence

We deliver high‑quality services with disciplined execution and the right talent.

Teamwork

We respect each other, communicate openly and combine our strengths to serve clients.

Innovation

We create value through creative ideas and continuous improvement.

Leadership

We lead positive change in ICT with sound strategies and initiatives.

Sustainability

We deliver with environmental responsibility and long‑term sustainability in mind.

Communication

We share information clearly and on time with clients, employees, partners and vendors.

Services

We design value into profit by developing solutions to your problems!

Barcode & RFID

Auto-ID solutions for tracking and operations visibility.

Network

Design, bandwidth, infrastructure setup and management.

Security

Network security, SPA and surveillance solutions.

System & Storage

Backup/DR, desktop, SAN/NAS, virtualization, OS solutions.

Other Services

CAR rental, IT advisory, outsourcing, and programming.
